title: Senior Software Engineer - Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
